channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Severe heatwave in India drives rise in heatstroke cases, hospitals report critical patients
item.description: India is grappling with an intense heatwave that has led to a significant rise in heatstroke cases, particularly in northern states such as Uttar Pradesh and the capital, Delhi. Andhra Pradesh alone h...

item.title: PCB Announces 16-Member Pakistan Squad for Upcoming ODIs Against Australia
item.description: Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has announced a 16-member squad for the forthcoming three-match ODI series against Australia, which is scheduled from May 30 to June 4 in Rawalpindi and Lahore. Shaheen Sh...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Concludes 'The Late Show' with Celebrity Tributes and Subtle Critiques of CBS and Paramount
item.description: Stephen Colbert ended his tenure as host of 'The Late Show' on a largely celebratory note, while also including humorous critiques aimed at CBS and its parent company, Paramount. The final episode fea...

item.title: Melbourne Homes with Exceptional Kitchens: A Look at Five Stunning Properties
item.description: Kitchens have evolved beyond mere practicality to become the heart of the home, serving as spaces for cooking, entertaining, and family gatherings. In Melbourne, several properties are leading the way...

item.title: NPFL Season Ends With Two Trophies Ready as Rangers and Rivers United Battle for Title
item.description: The Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) season for 2025/26 don reach final day and e don turn to real wahala as both Enugu Rangers and Rivers United dey fight for the league crown. Rangers dey lead...

item.title: Liberal MPs express internal concerns over federal environmental policies and Alberta pipeline deal
item.description: Fourteen Liberal Members of Parliament from across Canada have privately expressed concern over recent federal decisions affecting environmental regulations. Ahead of the federal government's new agre...

item.title: Winners of the 2026 Ivor Novello Awards Recognised for Songwriting Excellence
item.description: The 2026 Ivor Novello Awards celebrated outstanding songwriting across the UK and internationally. Geordie singer Sam Fender received the prestigious Songwriter of the Year award, praised for his emot...

item.title: Anmol alias Pinky placed under 14-day judicial remand in multiple narcotics and murder cases
item.description: KARACHI: Anmol, also known as Pinky, who is alleged to be a major figure in drug trafficking, was placed under a 14-day judicial remand on Friday. She faces multiple narcotics cases as well as a murde...

item.title: 1957 Mercury Voyager 2-Door Station Wagon: Icon of 1950s American Design
item.description: The 1957 Mercury Voyager 2-Door Station Wagon is a remarkable example of the exuberant 'Jet Age' design that defined 1950s America. Introduced during a transformative year for Mercury, the Voyager dep...

item.title: Dar City prepares for historic BAL quarter-final against Petro de Luanda
item.description: Dar City, one of Tanzania’s top basketball clubs, are set to face Angolan giants Petro de Luanda in the 2025 Basketball Africa League quarter-finals in Rwanda. This is a landmark moment for Tanzanian ...

item.title: Andy Burnham Poised as Potential UK Prime Minister Following Labour Victory
item.description: Andy Burnham, current mayor of Greater Manchester, is emerging as a prominent figure in UK politics and could become the next Prime Minister. During the 2024 general election, Labour achieved a decisi...

item.title: Stephen Colbert bids farewell to 'Late Show' with celebrity tributes and humor targeting CBS
item.description: Stephen Colbert concluded his run on 'The Late Show' with a farewell episode filled with emotional tributes, celebrity appearances, and comedic jabs at CBS following the show's cancellation. The final...

item.title: Second group of Australian IS-linked women and children leaving Syrian camp to face legal consequences
item.description: A second group of Australian women and children with connections to the Islamic State (IS) group have reportedly left the al-Roj refugee camp in Syria, potentially returning to Australia. Social Servi...

item.title: Stalin appeals for constructive approach as VCK and IUML join TVK government
item.description: On 22nd May 2026, M.K. Stalin, president of the Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) and former Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu, expressed his congratulations to Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi (VCK) MLA Vanni...

item.title: PNP calls Senate security firing during May 13 incident 'overkill'
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has described the gunfire from Office of the Senate Sergeant-at-Arms (OSAA) personnel during the May 13 Senate shooting as 'overkill.' Police Major General Robert ...

item.title: Police recover 119 AK-47 rounds hidden in Gombe
item.description: Gombe State Police Command don recover 119 rounds of live 7.62mm AK-47 ammunition wey dem hide inside one white sack along Kalshingi Road for Kwadon, Yamaltu/Deba Local Government Area. DSP Buhari Abd...

item.title: President Ruto Announces Diesel Price Reduction and Strike Suspension After Talks With Transport Operators
item.description: President William Ruto on Friday announced a further Sh10 reduction in diesel prices in the upcoming June-July pricing cycle after meeting with matatu operators, logistics companies, and other transpo...

item.title: Stephen Colbert and the Role of Humor in American Politics
item.description: The article reflects on the departure of Stephen Colbert from 'The Late Show' and its wider implications for political discourse in the United States. The author, John Casey, argues that Colbert was n...

item.title: Muhimbili Introduces Mobile Surgical Unit to Bring Surgery Services Closer to Rural Areas
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Muhimbili National Hospital (MNH) has just started its very first mobile surgical unit, a big step for bringing specialised medical services closer to Tanzanians, especially those livi...

item.title: Pakistan moves to facilitate foreign investment under PM Shehbaz’s guidance
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has emphasised that Pakistan is actively taking steps to enhance foreign investment, making it a top priority. During a meeting with Qatar’s Taameer Group delegation, led...
